info.title: ChargeOver API
info.description: ChargeOver is a recurring and subscription billing platform. This REST API provides access to manage customers, invoices, subscriptions, transactions, and related billing resources.

get.description: Retrieve a specific customer by ID.

put.description: Set a customer status to inactive.

post.description: Send an email to a customer.

get.description: Retrieve a specific invoice by ID.

post.summary: Add a late fee to an invoice
post.description: Add a late fee to an existing invoice.

post.summary: Apply a payment to an invoice
post.description: Apply a payment to an invoice.

get.summary: Get a PDF of an invoice
get.description: Download the PDF representation of an invoice.
Retrieve a specific subscription by ID.

post.description: Create a payment, credit memo, or record offline payment.

get.description: Retrieve a specific transaction by ID.

post.description: Send a transaction receipt via email.
